name: Apple-Praline Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored and sliced
1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Fit one piecrust into a 9-inch pieplate according to package directions.
2. Arrange apple slices in the crust and sprinkle with lemon rind. Set aside.
3. In a bowl, combine 3/4 cup corn syrup, 3 tablespoons butter, 3 tablespoons sugar, 3 tablespoons flour, and apple pie spice. Pour over apple slices.
4. In another bowl, mix remaining 3 tablespoons corn syrup, remaining 3 tablespoons butter, remaining 3 tablespoons flour, brown sugar, and pecans. Spoon this mixture over the apple slices.
5. Unfold the remaining piecrust. Cut 2 to 3 desired shapes from the center using a cookie cutter. Reserve cutouts.
6. Place the piecrust over the filling; fold edges under and crimp.
7. Brush the cutouts with water and attach them to the top of the pie.
8. Place on a baking sheet. Bake at 425°F for 25 minutes. Remove from oven and dollop with remaining brown sugar mixture. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake an additional 10 minutes. Cool completely.
Makes 1 (9-inch) pie.
